message:
🌱 Add oras: Add new commands to support uploading and downloading images mission (#963)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oras-1366-add-new-commands-to-support-uploading-and-downloading-images",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oras: Add new commands to support uploading and downloading images",
+    "description": "Add new commands to support uploading and downloading images. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oras deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oras version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nhelm list -n oras 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oras installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oras configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oras configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get configmap -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oras\n```\n### What is the version of your ORAS CLI\n\noras v1.1.0\n\n### What would you like to be added?\n\nHad an offline discussion with  and he suggests to add two commands:\n- `oras backup` (alias: `snapshot`, `pull-image`) to support saving an image from"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add new commands to support uploading and downloading images",
+        "description": "Specification for the way the `oras backup` and `oras restore` commands will work.\nPartial: https://github.com/oras-project/oras/issues/1366\n```yaml\n- `oras restore` (alias: `push-image`) to support pushing an image from an OCI image layout tar archive to remote registry.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get events -n oras --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add new commands to support uploading and downloading images\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Specification for the way the `oras backup` and `oras restore` commands will work.\nPartial: https://github.com/oras-project/oras/issues/1366",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "- `oras restore` (alias: `push-image`) to support pushing an image from an OCI image layout tar archive to remote registry."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oras",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "oras"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+    ],
